## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Promptfoo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, competitor landscape, and next steps for article production.](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on AI red-teaming and vulnerability scanning as Promptfoo's key differentiator](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Target audience: AI engineers/developers and security professionals (director level, CTOs)](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Need to refine content strategy: shorter, more technical articles assuming audience expertise](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Aim to publish first polished article as a benchmark for future content](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Reduce article length by half, assuming technical proficiency of readers](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Focus on problem-solving and direct linkage to Promptfoo's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Create anchor articles explaining Promptfoo's perspective for different personas](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Ensure feedback implementation in outlines before full article development](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

### Competitor Landscape

  - [Main distinction: guardrails market (crowded) vs. AI red-teaming/vulnerability scanning (Promptfoo's focus)](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Promptfoo has a product lead in red-teaming capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Competitors often focus on guardrails or observability offerings](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

### Target Audience Clarification

  - [Two main personas:](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
    1.  Developers/LLM engineers working directly with code
    2.  Security professionals (director level, CTOs) needing education on LLM security
  - [Content should cater to both technical and educational needs](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

### Product Differentiation

  - [Promptfoo started as an LLM evaluation framework](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Capability to construct custom metrics for LLM behavior evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Bridges gap between red-teaming and product evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to update Airtable with latest article drafts by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Vanessa to select and provide feedback on a couple of articles](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Team to reduce copy length and focus on implementing previous feedback](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Aim to finalize and publish the first polished article as a benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/zbkzALvb_tv8NP66z-74zcJxfngPFvwP?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
